n5_field_metric_crosschecks.a2_true_source: B62 structural opposition involution theta=-w0 (ledger V13); NOT pinv-limit-derived
n5_field_metric_crosschecks.conclusion: ALL pinv-limit realizations (F_p random-S, F_p S=I, real MP-pinv) give char(M^2)=1 with a non-Dickson degree-3 leftover at the degenerate even-k sector (repeated char(M^2)^2,(t+1)^2). Field/metric is NOT the cause; the exact-Q fix would also give a_2=1. The pinv-limit CONSTRUCTION underflows the eigenvalue collision; a_2=2 is recovered only structurally (B62). Brief outcome 3: STOP, do not patch, joint reassessment.
